refnamediv.refpurpose: Reconstruct an image from Radon projections.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imiradon(projection, theta) out = imiradon(projection, theta, outputSize)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Performs a simple filtered-back-projection-style reconstruction from projections and their angles in degrees.

refsection.title: Examples
